transliteration: Tebbet yeda ebi lehebin ve tebb

translations.tr: Ebû Leheb'in elleri kurusun! Kurudu da.
translations.en: May the hands of Abu Lahab be ruined, and ruined is he.

arabic: مَا أَغْنَىٰ عَنْهُ مَالُهُ وَمَا كَسَبَ
transliteration: Ma agna anhu maluhu ve ma keseb

translations.tr: Ona ne malı fayda verdi, ne de kazandığı.
translations.en: His wealth will not avail him or that which he gained.
He will burn in a Fire of blazing flame.
And his wife as well — the carrier of firewood.

translations.tr: Boynunda bükülmüş bir ip olduğu halde.
translations.en: Around her neck is a rope of twisted fiber.
